site.name: La Maison Dorée
site.description: An exceptional fine-dining experience in the heart of the city. Michelin-starred cuisine, impeccable service, and an ambiance of refined elegance.

footer.address: 47 Rue de la Gastronomie, City Center
footer.hoursValue: Tue-Sat: 5:30 PM - 10:30 PM | Sun: 11:00 AM - 3:00 PM | Mon: Closed
footer.copyright: La Maison Dorée. All rights reserved.

home.heroSubtitle: Experience the artistry of fine dining at La Maison Dorée, where every dish tells a story of passion, tradition, and innovation.
home.featuredSubtitle: A selection of our chef's most celebrated creations
home.specialsSubtitle: Seasonal creations crafted with the finest ingredients
home.ctaSubtitle: Reserve your table and let us create an unforgettable dining experience tailored just for you.
home.dish1Desc: With saffron beurre blanc, fennel confit, and crispy capers
home.dish2Desc: Truffle mashed potatoes, roasted bone marrow, red wine jus
home.dish3Desc: Handmade pasta filled with Maine lobster in a bisque reduction
home.special1Desc: Arborio rice with black summer truffles, aged parmesan, and wild mushrooms
home.special2Desc: Slow-roasted duck breast with caramelized orange glaze and braised endive
home.special3Desc: Valrhona dark chocolate soufflé with vanilla bean crème anglaise

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: A carefully curated selection of dishes that celebrate the finest seasonal ingredients and culinary craftsmanship
menu.appetizer1Desc: Fresh yellowfin tuna with avocado mousse, sesame tuile, and yuzu dressing
menu.appetizer2Desc: Creamy burrata with vine-ripened heirloom tomatoes, basil oil, aged balsamic
menu.appetizer3Desc: House-made foie gras with brioche toast, fig compote, and Sauternes gelée
menu.appetizer4Desc: Silky mushroom soup with truffle foam and toasted hazelnuts
menu.main1Desc: New Zealand lamb with rosemary jus, ratatouille, and potato gratin
menu.main2Desc: Atlantic halibut with pea purée, morel mushrooms, and Champagne sauce
menu.main3Desc: Prime beef tenderloin with green peppercorn sauce, asparagus, and pommes dauphine
menu.main4Desc: Creamy carnaroli rice with mixed wild mushrooms, truffle oil, and parmesan crisp
menu.dessert1Desc: Classic Tahitian vanilla bean crème brûlée with caramelized sugar crust
menu.dessert2Desc: Upside-down caramelized apple tart with Calvados crème fraîche
menu.dessert3Desc: Warm molten chocolate cake with raspberry coulis and vanilla ice cream
menu.dessert4Desc: Artisanal cheese board with honeycomb, quince paste, and walnut bread
menu.wine1Desc: Bordeaux, France — Full-bodied with notes of blackcurrant, cedar, and truffle
menu.wine2Desc: Burgundy, France — Elegant and complex with silky tannins and dark fruit
menu.wine3Desc: Tuscany, Italy — Super Tuscan with rich blackberry, spice, and tobacco
menu.wine4Desc: Champagne, France — Refined bubbles with brioche, pear, and citrus zest
menu.wine5Desc: Marlborough, New Zealand — Crisp and vibrant with passionfruit and gooseberry
menu.wine6Desc: Rioja, Spain — Tempranillo with vanilla, leather, and dark cherry

about.title: Our Story
about.chefBio1: Chef Antoine Laurent discovered his passion for cooking in his grandmother's kitchen in Lyon, France. At just 16, he began his apprenticeship at a Michelin-starred restaurant, and by 24, he was named one of France's most promising young chefs.
about.chefBio2: After honing his craft in Paris, Tokyo, and New York, Chef Laurent opened La Maison Dorée in 2015 with a singular vision: to create a dining experience that honors classical French technique while embracing global influences and seasonal, locally-sourced ingredients.
about.chefBio3: Today, Chef Laurent leads a team of talented culinary professionals who share his commitment to excellence, creativity, and hospitality. Every plate that leaves the kitchen reflects his philosophy that food should nourish not just the body, but the soul.
about.philosophy1Desc: We partner with regional farmers, foragers, and artisans to bring the freshest seasonal ingredients to your table. Our menu evolves with the seasons, celebrating nature's bounty at its peak.
about.philosophy2Desc: From house-made bread and hand-rolled pasta to in-house charcuterie, we honor time-honored techniques that elevate simple ingredients into extraordinary dishes.
about.philosophy3Desc: Our front-of-house team delivers warm, attentive service with meticulous attention to detail. We believe hospitality is an art form, and every guest deserves a memorable experience.
about.award1Desc: Recognized for exceptional cuisine, worth a detour
about.award3Desc: One of the world's finest wine programs
